name: Avocado Kashmir
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream Of Celery Soup, or
1 can Cream Of Chicken Soup, or
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the protein: Cook 2 cups of chicken or shrimp until tender.
2. Heat ghee in a skillet and add spices: cumin, chili powder, turmeric, and coriander.
3. Add chopped onion and apples to the skillet and sauté until they become limp.
4. Pour in the soup (celery, chicken, or shrimp) and stir in salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cook over low heat until the mixture is smooth.
6. Stir in the cooked eggplant (or cooked chicken/shrimp).
7. Place rice in a separate bowl with 1 1/2 cups of water. Cover and steam until the rice is tender.
8. Peel the avocados and rub each half with lemon juice to prevent discoloration.
9. Arrange each avocado half on a bed of rice on individual salad plates.
10. Fill each avocado half with the curry mixture.
11. Place condiments such as raisins, whole peanuts, chutney, toasted coconut, lime, scallions, and crumbled bacon in separate dishes at the table.
12. Serve and enjoy!
